title: Assistant Store Manager - Reliance Footprint - 2025 Hiring Drive

jsonLd.title: Assistant Store Manager - Reliance Footprint - 2025 Hiring Drive
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Reliance Footprint! We are hiring a Assistant Store Manager for our Navi Mumbai team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Reliance Footprint:
Reliance Footprint is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Planogram
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention
• Proficiency in POS Systems
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in CRM
• Proficiency in Shrinkage Control
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Learning & development budget
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Life and accident insurance
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Navi Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Reliance Footprint!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
